name_en: 25C Lunch Box Bag exquisite small chain clutch 👜 Imported lambskin with diamond-encrusted gold metal. The most classic quilted pattern adorns the surface, making the bag look more structured. Lambskin finish. Removable chain, can be carried by hand, capacity is suitable. Unique design and practicality make it my recent favorite. No.: 66013 Dimensions: 17-19.5-5 Includes packaging
